notes: v1.5.6 — Guard reads your losses right, and the monitor tells you WHY. FIXED — a 'consecutive losses' pause now fires on every qualifying loss, not just the first (a losing streak only climbs, so the old rule paused you once and went quiet through the rest); a break-even scratch no longer clears your streak. FIXED — hold-time tracking is accurate while a position is open (some multi-account setups showed 0), and unrealized P&L is read at your broker's true mark so 'unrealized P&L below' rules behave. NEW — the PSI monitor names the ONE thing driving your score in plain language ('Oversizing', 'Overtrading') the moment it starts to build, so you finally know why — and spoken alerts now have an on/off switch in Settings. Closing or reducing a position is never blocked.
